agent.name: runtime-bug-hunter
agent.role: Audit runtime behavior, control flow, and API correctness for dashboard paths in the WIP batch scope.

findings.title: Onboarding cluster POST uses process.cwd() when repo path is not local
findings.description: Re-audit: route rejects non-local repoAccess with 400 and uses only absolute localPath as repoPath; no process.cwd() fallback remains.

proof_hooks.summary: isLocal gate returns 400 when repoAccess does not start with '/'; repoPath = repoAccess only after local check

history.notes: Re-audit (logic-20260410-030202): cwd fallback absent; remote-only URL cannot reach collectors.

findings.title: Orchestration enqueue secret can be read from sessionStorage by page scripts
findings.description: Re-audit: enqueue secret is held in module memory; writeEnqueueSecret does not persist to sessionStorage. Legacy key is read once to migrate then removed.

proof_hooks.summary: readEnqueueSecret returns memorySecret; writeEnqueueSecret sets memory only and removeItem on legacy key
mergeEnqueueSecret calls readEnqueueSecret (in-memory), not sessionStorage.getItem for the live secret

history.notes: Re-audit: original sessionStorage-as-source vector addressed; residual XSS could still read in-tab memory (documented tradeoff).

next_actions.action: None for f-1ff003db / f-8603ee3b — verified closed in synthesizer merge.
